lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane artifact-only recertification; both scenarios drive guard-verification proof.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: post-cert-spec-edit-guard.sh re-runs captured in report.md: red at exit 1 (G088 post-cert edit without recert) pre-mutation, green at exit 0 (PASS with certifiedAt + currentSpecReview) post-mutation.

scenarios.title: Spec 054 G088 PASSES after recertification
scenarios.given: specs/054-notification-intelligence-handler/state.json with status "done", a top-level certifiedAt on or after the latest post-cert edit on scopes.md (2026-06-05T16:15:45Z), and a bubbles.spec-review executionHistory entry with reviewStatus "CURRENT" whose runCompletedAt is on or before that certifiedAt
scenarios.then: the guard exits 0; it reports "PASS Gate G088 (post_certification_spec_edit_gate)"; the message annotates certifiedAt and currentSpecReview with the new recertification timestamp
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: post-cert-spec-edit-guard.sh specs/054-notification-intelligence-handler exits 0 with a PASS line citing certifiedAt=2026-06-06T01:30:00Z and currentSpecReview=2026-06-06T01:29:00Z; state-transition-guard.sh Check 30 emits PASS Gate G088 for spec 054.

scenarios.title: Adversarial — a future post-cert planning-truth edit still trips G088
scenarios.given: specs/054-notification-intelligence-handler/state.json with status "done" and the new certifiedAt set at the moment of this recertification
scenarios.when: a hypothetical post-cert edit lands on spec.md, design.md, or scopes.md after that certifiedAt, and neither requiresRevalidation:true nor a fresh bubbles.spec-review CURRENT entry is recorded
scenarios.then: post-cert-spec-edit-guard.sh exits non-zero; it names the offending commit, file, and subject in its diagnostic output
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: A subsequent post-cert edit on spec.md/design.md/scopes.md landing after certifiedAt, without requiresRevalidation:true or a fresh bubbles.spec-review CURRENT entry, makes post-cert-spec-edit-guard.sh exit non-zero and name the offending commit, file, and subject.
